title: N-PAMP KEM Registry
description: Schema for the JSON representation of registries/kem.csv: an array of row objects, one per registered hybrid KEM. code_point is a 16-bit value (4 hex digits). profiles is a comma-separated list of profile names drawn from {Standard, High, Sovereign}. Wrong-format code_point, missing column, empty name/construction, and out-of-set profile tokens are caught here; DUPLICATE code_point values are caught by the companion validate-registries.py.

code_point.description: 16-bit KEM code point, hex-prefixed, exactly 4 hex digits (e.g. 0x11ec).

name.description: Hybrid KEM suite name; MUST be non-empty.

profiles.description: Comma-separated list of profiles that permit this KEM; each token in {Standard, High, Sovereign}.
